---
title: "Lecture Slides"
subtitle: "Slides will posted after each class meeting."
---

Slides are in PDF format. Click a link to open or right-click to download.

### Week 1

[Day 1- Introductions](Slides/lecture01.pdf)

[Day 2- The Importance of Research: Causality and Inference](Slides/lecture02.pdf)

[Day 3- Research Questions and Literature Reviews](Slides/lecture03.pdf)

[Day 4- Measurement 1: Concepts and Variables](Slides/lecture04.pdf)

### Week 2

[Day 5- Measurement 2: Reliability and Validity](Slides/lecture05.pdf)

[Day 6- Probability and Confidence Intervals](Slides/lecture06.pdf)

[Day 7- Regression](Slides/lecture07.pdf)

```{=html}
```

### Week 3

[Day 9- Regression Again - Multivariate, Assumptions, and Robustness](Slides/lecture09.pdf)
